customCSS: .aurora-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}.aurora-band1,.aurora-band2,.aurora-band3{position:absolute;width:160%;height:40%;left:-30%;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);opacity:0}.aurora-band1{top:5%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0%,rgba(34,197,94,0.18) 20%,rgba(56,189,248,0.14) 40%,rgba(168,85,247,0.12) 60%,rgba(34,197,94,0.16) 80%,transparent 100%);animation:aurora-wave1 16s ease-in-out infinite}.aurora-band2{top:12%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0%,rgba(56,189,248,0.14) 25%,rgba(34,197,94,0.16) 50%,rgba(251,191,36,0.08) 75%,transparent 100%);animation:aurora-wave2 20s ease-in-out infinite}.aurora-band3{top:2%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0%,rgba(168,85,247,0.10) 30%,rgba(56,189,248,0.12) 50%,rgba(34,197,94,0.14) 70%,transparent 100%);animation:aurora-wave3 24s ease-in-out infinite}.aurora-stars{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 8% 12%,rgba(255,255,255,0.7),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 15% 35%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 22% 68%,rgba(255,255,255,0.6),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 30% 20%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 38% 52%,rgba(255,255,255,0.7),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 45% 85%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 55% 10%,rgba(255,255,255,0.6),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 62% 42%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 70% 75%,rgba(255,255,255,0.7),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 78% 28%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1.5px 1.5px at 85% 60%,rgba(255,255,255,0.6),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 92% 18%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 50% 50%,rgba(255,255,255,0.4),transparent),radial-gradient(1px 1px at 35% 90%,rgba(255,255,255,0.5),transparent)}.aurora-horizon{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:30%;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(6,8,24,1) 0%,transparent 100%)}@keyframes aurora-wave1{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-8%) scaleY(1);opacity:0.6}25%{transform:translateX(3%) scaleY(1.2);opacity:0.85}50%{transform:translateX(8%) scaleY(0.9);opacity:0.7}75%{transform:translateX(-3%) scaleY(1.1);opacity:0.8}}@keyframes aurora-wave2{0%,100%{transform:translateX(5%) scaleY(1);opacity:0.5}33%{transform:translateX(-6%) scaleY(1.3);opacity:0.75}66%{transform:translateX(8%) scaleY(0.8);opacity:0.6}}@keyframes aurora-wave3{0%,100%{transform:translateX(0%) scaleY(1);opacity:0.4}25%{transform:translateX(10%) scaleY(1.1);opacity:0.65}50%{transform:translateX(-5%) scaleY(1.4);opacity:0.55}75%{transform:translateX(3%) scaleY(0.9);opacity:0.7}}
